title: nasa rugosa
intro: Nasa rugosa, also known as the Himalayan nase or Korean mint, is a plant species that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nasa rugosa include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
